docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,410.00 FILED BY FRASER, LAUREN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JOYCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $0 SERVED APR-26-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JOYCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LAUREN FRASER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOYCE WONG IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRASER, LAUREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JOYCE $3,410.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,460.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
